page: OVHcloud r3-1024 is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by AMD EPYC Milan processors running at 2.3 GHz. The instance features 128 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU scores. Memory subsystem performance is also in the top tier for small-block read-only cached bandwidth, while large-block read and write bandwidths fall into the strong category. Single-core performance is strong, though single-threaded tasks like gzip compression and bzip3 decompression show average results.

Tradeoffs are evident in LLM inference tasks; while prompt processing speeds for 135M, 7B, and 70B models rank in the top tier or strong categories, text generation speeds drop to average for smaller models and poor for the 70B model, reflecting the lack of dedicated GPU acceleration. The high memory density and strong multi-threaded capabilities make this instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database operations, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing.
description: OVHcloud r3-1024 is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC Milan processors at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 1024.0 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Operating under a KVM hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance, alongside strong database operation capabilities. However, single-threaded operations and large-model text generation show lower relative performance due to the absence of hyperthreading and GPU acceleration. This instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads, multi-threaded data processing, and large-scale database operations.
og_description: OVHcloud r3-1024 is a memory-optimized server with 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 1024 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 1024 GB RAM for demanding multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores with no hyperthreading
1024 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB of memory per core
Bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD and 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark results
Suited for memory-intensive databases, software compilation, and multi-threaded processing
